product_overview: IGreen NPK is a microbial consortium-based biofertilizer containing beneficial bacteria Azotobacter chroococcum, Bacillus megaterium, and Frateuria aurantia. It enhances nitrogen fixation, phosphorus solubilization, and potassium mobilization in soil. The formulation improves nutrient availability and uptake efficiency for better plant growth and yield. It also promotes root development and soil microbial activity. IGreen NPK is widely used in sustainable agriculture and Integrated Nutrient Management (INM) systems.
key_product_highlights: Enhances availability of nitrogen, phosphorus, and potassium
Improves nutrient uptake and use efficiency
Promotes balanced root and shoot development
Solubilizes phosphorus and mobilizes potassium effectively
Boosts soil microbial activity and soil health
Increases crop yield and overall productivity

mechanism_of_action.description: The microbial consortium colonizes the rhizosphere and root surface, fixes atmospheric nitrogen through associative N-fixing members, solubilizes bound phosphorus and mobilizes native potassium pools, and drives microbial nutrient cycling in the soil. This combined activity improves nutrient availability, root uptake efficiency, and overall crop nutrition.

dilution_dosage_per_acre.crop_stage: Basal soil application or early crop establishment
dilution_dosage_per_acre.water_volume: NA; 25-50 kg compost carrier or drip water
dilution_dosage_per_acre.application_method: Soil incorporation, furrow placement, or drip-supported root-zone delivery

dilution_dosage_per_acre.crop_stage: Active vegetative stage or nutrient top-up
dilution_dosage_per_acre.application_method: Root-zone drench or drip application near feeder roots

application_repeatability.application_timing: At sowing, transplanting, or basal land preparation
application_repeatability.recommendation: Introduce the consortium early so rhizosphere colonization starts before nutrient demand peaks.

application_repeatability.application_timing: During active vegetative growth or after heavy leaching
application_repeatability.recommendation: Reapply to sustain microbial nutrient cycling when crop demand or nutrient loss remains high.

shelf_life_statement: Typical shelf life: 24 months in the unopened original container under cool, dry, shaded storage.
compatibility_statement: Do not mix with antimicrobial dressers, strong fungicides, bactericides, or highly saline concentrates.

problem_solution.problem: Applied fertilizer is not translating into uniform crop nutrition.
problem_solution.solution: Use the consortium to improve nutrient conversion, cycling, and root-zone uptake efficiency.

problem_solution.problem: Soil biological activity is low and nutrient release is slow.
problem_solution.solution: Apply early to stimulate rhizosphere colonization and multi-nutrient mobilization.

storage_safety: Store sealed in the original pack away from direct sunlight, heat, and moisture.
technical_positioning_summary: Broad-spectrum consortium positioned as a base biological nutrient-efficiency input where N, P, and K response must be improved together.

product_overview: IGreen SHIELD is a biological plant protection product formulated with a consortium of beneficial bacteria, including Bacillus licheniformis, Bacillus amyloliquefaciens, and Bacillus subtilis. It acts through antagonism, competitive colonization, and production of antimicrobial compounds to suppress a wide range of soil-borne and foliar pathogens. The formulation helps manage diseases such as Fusarium, Rhizoctonia, Alternaria, and powdery mildew. It also enhances root health, plant vigor, and natural defense mechanisms.
key_product_highlights: Controls bacterial diseases such as leaf blight with efficient biocontrol activity.
Produces antifungal compounds that disrupt pathogen growth and colonization.
Enhances systemic resistance in plants, providing long-lasting internal protection.
Improves overall plant health leading to increased yields and better crop quality.
Provides both preventive and curative effects for holistic crop protection.

mechanism_of_action.description: The consortium colonizes the rhizosphere, contributes associative nitrogen fixation, solubilizes native and applied nutrient pools, and sustains microbial nutrient cycling around feeder roots. By maintaining an active microbial zone near roots, it improves nutrient capture efficiency and stabilizes crop nutrition under stress-prone soil conditions.

problem_solution.solution: Apply the consortium early to condition the rhizosphere and improve nutrient capture around roots.

product_overview: IGreen N is a microbial nitrogen-fixing biofertilizer formulated with beneficial bacterial strains Azotobacter chroococcum, Azospirillum brasilense, and Rhizobium spp. It enhances biological nitrogen fixation in soil and within the plant rhizosphere. The formulation improves nitrogen availability, root development, and overall plant growth performance. It also supports better nutrient uptake efficiency and soil microbial activity. IGreen N is widely used in Integrated Nutrient Management (INM) and sustainable agriculture systems.
key_product_highlights: Enhances biological nitrogen fixation naturally
Improves nitrogen availability in the soil
Promotes strong root and shoot growth
Boosts soil microbial activity and fertility
Reduces dependency on chemical fertilizers
Improves crop yield and overall productivity

mechanism_of_action.description: The consortium colonizes the rhizosphere and root surface, fixes atmospheric nitrogen through associative diazotrophic members, and supports microbial nutrient cycling that improves nitrogen conversion and uptake. Supportive nutrient solubilization in the root zone further enhances the efficiency of applied fertilizer nitrogen.

product_overview: IGreen P is a phosphate-solubilizing biofertilizer formulated with beneficial bacterial strains Bacillus megaterium and Bacillus polymyxa. It enhances the solubilization of insoluble soil phosphates, making phosphorus more available to plants. The formulation improves root development, nutrient uptake efficiency, and overall plant growth performance. It also supports better soil microbial activity and soil fertility improvement. IGreen P is widely used in Integrated Nutrient Management (INM) and sustainable agriculture systems.
key_product_highlights: Enhances phosphorus availability in the soil
Improves nutrient uptake and utilization efficiency
Promotes strong root growth and development
Stimulates beneficial soil microbial activity
Improves soil fertility and structure
Increases crop yield and overall productivity

mechanism_of_action.description: The consortium colonizes the rhizosphere and solubilizes insoluble phosphorus through organic acid production and allied microbial nutrient cycling processes. Supportive associative nitrogen fixation and root-zone colonization improve total nutrient capture, while released phosphate becomes more available for root uptake.

technical_positioning_summary: Phosphorus-solubilizing consortium positioned for low-P efficiency soils and stronger root establishment.

product_overview: IGreen K is a potassium-mobilizing biofertilizer formulated with beneficial bacterial strains Frateuria aurantia and Bacillus mucilaginosus. It enhances the release and solubilization of fixed soil potassium, making it more available for plant uptake. The formulation improves nutrient efficiency, root growth, and overall crop development. It also supports better soil fertility and microbial activity in the rhizosphere. IGreen K is widely used in Integrated Nutrient Management (INM) and sustainable agriculture systems.
key_product_highlights: Enhances availability of soil-bound potassium to plants
Improves nutrient uptake and utilization efficiency
Promotes strong root and shoot development
Increases crop yield and quality
Stimulates beneficial soil microbial activity
Improves plant tolerance to stress conditions
Supports sustainable and eco-friendly farming practices

mechanism_of_action.description: The consortium colonizes the rhizosphere, mobilizes potassium from mineral fractions through organic acid and chelation-mediated processes, and supports microbial nutrient cycling around roots. Supportive nitrogen-fixing and nutrient-solubilizing members improve total nutrient capture while increasing access to plant-available potassium.

product_overview: IGreen Zn is a zinc-solubilizing biofertilizer formulated with beneficial bacterial strains Bacillus subtilis and Bacillus megaterium. It enhances the conversion of insoluble soil zinc into plant-available forms. The formulation improves zinc uptake efficiency, root development, and overall plant growth performance. It also supports better enzyme activity, chlorophyll formation, and crop productivity. IGreen Zn is widely used in Integrated Nutrient Management (INM) and sustainable agriculture systems.
key_product_highlights: Enhances zinc availability in the soil
Corrects zinc deficiency in crops
Improves nutrient uptake and utilization
Promotes strong root growth and development
Boosts crop yield and quality
Supports sustainable and eco-friendly farming

mechanism_of_action.description: The consortium colonizes the rhizosphere and solubilizes zinc-bearing compounds through acidification, chelation, and active microbial nutrient cycling. Supportive nitrogen-fixing and nutrient-mobilizing members maintain root-zone activity, resulting in improved zinc availability and more efficient plant uptake.

product_overview: IGreen S is a biological sulfur-oxidizing biofertilizer formulated with the beneficial bacterium Acidithiobacillus ferrooxidans. It enhances the oxidation of elemental sulfur and conversion into plant-available sulfate forms in the soil. The formulation helps improve sulfur nutrition, chlorophyll synthesis, and overall plant metabolic activity. It also supports better soil fertility and microbial balance in the rhizosphere. IGreen S is widely used in Integrated Nutrient Management (INM) and sustainable agricultural systems.
key_product_highlights: Converts elemental sulfur into plant-available sulfate
Enhances sulfur availability and nutrient uptake
Promotes strong root growth and development
Improves soil microbial activity and soil health
Increases crop yield and quality
Supports sustainable and eco-friendly farming

mechanism_of_action.description: The consortium colonizes the rhizosphere and promotes sulfur oxidation or mobilization into plant-available sulfate forms while sustaining active microbial nutrient cycling around roots. Supportive nitrogen-fixing and nutrient-solubilizing members improve the overall efficiency of nutrient capture and utilization in the crop.

product_overview: IGreen Si is a biological silicon-solubilizing biofertilizer formulated with the beneficial bacterium Bacillus mycoides. It enhances the availability of plant-available silicic acid by mobilizing insoluble silicon compounds in the soil. The formulation strengthens plant cell walls, improves structural integrity, and increases resistance to biotic and abiotic stresses. It also supports better root development, nutrient uptake, and overall crop vigor. IGreen Si is widely used in Integrated Nutrient Management (INM) and sustainable agriculture systems.
key_product_highlights: Enhances availability of plant-usable silicon
Strengthens plant cell walls and structure
Improves tolerance to drought and disease stress
Promotes strong root growth and development
Boosts crop vigor, yield, and quality
Supports sustainable and eco-friendly farming

mechanism_of_action.description: The consortium colonizes the rhizosphere and mobilizes soluble silicon from silicate-bearing minerals through microbial weathering, acidification, and nutrient cycling processes. Supportive nitrogen-fixing and nutrient-solubilizing activity improves root-zone function, allowing better access to silicon and associated nutrients.
